creator: c.braam@tue.nl
text:
When I run freebsd-update with the default freebsd-update.conf I get the following response:

artemis# freebsd-update -f /etc/freebsd-update.conf -r 7.0-RELEASE upgrade
Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 1 mirrors found.
Fetching public key from update1.FreeBSD.org... failed.

I could not find any clue how to solve this problem

Carel Braam
